description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Lint that runs on push to main and rel-* branches and on pull requests. The workflow has two jobs: optional-lint and lint-python-format. The optional-lint job checks for spelling mistakes and performs static checks on shell scripts. The lint-python-format job sets up Python 3.9, installs dependencies, runs lintrunner on all files, produces a SARIF file, and uploads it to GitHub.
